base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title — a ui (menu_screen) from 1991 street fighter ii. Street Fighter II title screen + attract mode. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Street Fighter II title screen + attract mode
